children.value:
\begin{aligned}
\int \cos (a x+b) d x
&=\int \cos t \frac{d t}{a}\\
&=\frac{1}{a} \int \cos t d t\\
&=\frac{1}{a} \sin t+C \\
& =\frac{1}{a} \sin (a x+b)+C
\end{aligned}
children.html: ∫cos⁡(ax+b)dx=∫cos⁡tdta=1a∫cos⁡tdt=1asin⁡t+C=1asin⁡(ax+b)+C\begin{aligned} \int \cos (a x+b) d x &=\int \cos t \frac{d t}{a}\\ &=\frac{1}{a} \int \cos t d t\\ &=\frac{1}{a} \sin t+C \\ & =\frac{1}{a} \sin (a x+b)+C \end{aligned}∫cos(ax+b)dx​=∫costadt​=a1​∫costdt=a1​sint+C=a1​sin(ax+b)+C​

children.value: と考えて部分積分法を用いる。

children.html: ∫log⁡xdx=∫log⁡x⋅(x)′dx=log⁡x⋅x−∫(log⁡x)′xdx=xlog⁡x−∫1xxdx=xlog⁡x−∫dx=xlog⁡x−x+C\begin{aligned} \int \log x d x & =\int \log x \cdot(x)^{\prime} d x=\log x \cdot x-\int(\log x)^{\prime} x d x \\ & =x \log x-\int \frac{1}{x} x d x=x \log x-\int d x \\ & =x \log x-x+C \end{aligned}∫logxdx​=∫logx⋅(x)′dx=logx⋅x−∫(logx)′xdx=xlogx−∫x1​xdx=xlogx−∫dx=xlogx−x+C​

children.html: x3+4x2+2x+1x2+3=x+4−x+11x2+3\frac{x^3+4 x^2+2 x+1}{x^2+3}=x+4-\frac{x+11}{x^2+3}x2+3x3+4x2+2x+1​=x+4−x2+3x+11​

children.value: のような変形により、「多項式」と「分子の次数が分母の次数より低い有理関数」の和に書くことができる。
このとき、すべての有理関数は

Ax+B[(x−a)2+b2]m\displaystyle\frac{A x+B}{\left[(x-a)^2+b^2\right]^m}[(x−a)2+b2]mAx+B​

children.value: の形の和に分解できる。

children.html: ∫xαdx=1α+1xα+1+C(α≠−1)∫exdx=ex+C∫axdx=1log⁡aax+C(a>0,a≠1)∫1xdx=log⁡∣x∣+C\begin{aligned} & \int x^\alpha d x=\frac{1}{\alpha+1} x^{\alpha+1}+C \quad(\alpha \neq-1) \\ & \int e^x d x=e^x+C \\ & \int a^x d x=\frac{1}{\log a} a^x+C \quad(a>0, a \neq 1) \\ & \int \frac{1}{x} d x=\log |x|+C \end{aligned}​∫xαdx=α+11​xα+1+C(α=−1)∫exdx=ex+C∫axdx=loga1​ax+C(a>0,a=1)∫x1​dx=log∣x∣+C​

children.value:
\begin{aligned}
& \int \sin x d x=-\cos x+C \\
& \int \cos x d x=\sin x+C \\
& \int \frac{1}{\cos ^2 x} d x=\tan x+C \\
& \int \frac{1}{\sqrt{1-x^2}} d x=\sin ^{-1} x+C \\
& \int \frac{1}{1+x^2} d x=\tan ^{-1} x+C
\end{aligned}
children.html: ∫sin⁡xdx=−cos⁡x+C∫cos⁡xdx=sin⁡x+C∫1cos⁡2xdx=tan⁡x+C∫11−x2dx=sin⁡−1x+C∫11+x2dx=tan⁡−1x+C\begin{aligned} & \int \sin x d x=-\cos x+C \\ & \int \cos x d x=\sin x+C \\ & \int \frac{1}{\cos ^2 x} d x=\tan x+C \\ & \int \frac{1}{\sqrt{1-x^2}} d x=\sin ^{-1} x+C \\ & \int \frac{1}{1+x^2} d x=\tan ^{-1} x+C \end{aligned}​∫sinxdx=−cosx+C∫cosxdx=sinx+C∫cos2x1​dx=tanx+C∫1−x2​1​dx=sin−1x+C∫1+x21​dx=tan−1x+C​

children.value:
\begin{aligned}
\int \sin ^2 x ~d x 
&= \int \frac{1-\cos 2 x}{2} ~d x\\
&= \frac{1}{2} \int (1 - \cos 2x) ~dx\\
&= \frac{1}{2} (x + \frac{1}{2} \sin 2x) +C\\
&= \frac{1}{2} x + \frac{1}{4} \sin 2x + C\\
\end{aligned}
children.html: ∫sin⁡2x dx=∫1−cos⁡2x2 dx=12∫(1−cos⁡2x) dx=12(x+12sin⁡2x)+C=12x+14sin⁡2x+C\begin{aligned} \int \sin ^2 x ~d x &= \int \frac{1-\cos 2 x}{2} ~d x\\ &= \frac{1}{2} \int (1 - \cos 2x) ~dx\\ &= \frac{1}{2} (x + \frac{1}{2} \sin 2x) +C\\ &= \frac{1}{2} x + \frac{1}{4} \sin 2x + C\\ \end{aligned}∫sin2x dx​=∫21−cos2x​ dx=21​∫(1−cos2x) dx=21​(x+21​sin2x)+C=21​x+41​sin2x+C​
cos⁡2θ=1−2sin⁡2θ\cos 2 \theta = 1-2 \sin ^2 \thetacos2θ=1−2sin2θ
cos⁡2θ=1−2sin⁡2θ  ⟺  sin⁡2θ=1−cos⁡2θ2\cos 2 \theta = 1-2 \sin ^2 \theta \iff \sin ^2 \theta = \frac{1 - \cos 2 \theta}{2}cos2θ=1−2sin2θ⟺sin2θ=21−cos2θ​

children.value: をつかって次数を下げて解いている。

children.html: ∫cos⁡2x dx=∫1+cos⁡2x2 dx=12∫(1+cos⁡2x) dx=12(x+12sin⁡2x)+C=12x+14sin⁡2x+C\begin{aligned} \int \cos^2 x ~dx &= \int \frac{ 1 + \cos 2 x }{ 2 } ~dx \\ &= \frac{1}{2} \int (1 + \cos 2x) ~dx\\ &= \frac{1}{2} (x + \frac{1}{2} \sin 2x) + C\\ &= \frac{1}{2} x + \frac{1}{4} \sin 2x + C\\ \end{aligned}∫cos2x dx​=∫21+cos2x​ dx=21​∫(1+cos2x) dx=21​(x+21​sin2x)+C=21​x+41​sin2x+C​
cos⁡2θ=2cos⁡2θ−1  ⟺  cos⁡2θ=1+cos⁡2θ2\cos 2 \theta = 2 \cos ^2 \theta-1 \iff \cos ^2 \theta = \frac{ 1 + \cos 2 \theta }{ 2 }cos2θ=2cos2θ−1⟺cos2θ=21+cos2θ​

sin⁡2θ=2sin⁡θcos⁡θcos⁡2θ=1−2sin⁡2θ=2cos⁡2θ−1tan⁡2θ=2tan⁡θ1−tan⁡2θ\begin{aligned} \sin 2 \theta & =2 \sin \theta \cos \theta \\ \cos 2 \theta & =1-2 \sin ^2 \theta \\ & =2 \cos ^2 \theta-1 \\ \tan 2 \theta & =\frac{2 \tan \theta}{1-\tan ^2 \theta} \end{aligned}sin2θcos2θtan2θ​=2sinθcosθ=1−2sin2θ=2cos2θ−1=1−tan2θ2tanθ​​
